title: Amortized Analysis and Dynamic Structures · Invariant Recall
summary: Guarantee long-run latency for a structure with occasional expensive rebuilds. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for an amortized-cost ledger and implementation after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Bound total operation cost over a sequence and derive amortized cost.
Assign credits that cover future expensive operations without negative balances.
Define a nonnegative potential and calculate amortized cost changes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
